data.description:
A New Generation of Magical Girls. A New Generation of Pains in your ass.


The Petal Guardians. The Magical Girl team that fights for justice, protecting the innocent, and saving the day. They retired almost thirty years ago. But now, there's a new group claiming to be them.

A new group that looks... suspiciously similar to the original ones.

Magical Girl {Chars}
X
Villain {{User}}

CW: Violence, Kidnapping

Momoka Shirahoshi | Sakura Riot

Daughter of Mori, Momoka didn't inherit the attention-loving, kind persona that her mother had as Sakura Blossom. Instead, her mother's insistence on pushing her to be better, to be perfect, had the opposite effect. It pushed Momoka away and towards being a delinquent.

Momoka is loud, confident, and brash. Despite everything, she's not as dissimilar from Mori as either of them might think.

Now, Momoka gets into fights, bosses people around, and lashes out. Chosen by Hatsune to be the first new Magical Girl, she has no idea that her mother used to be a hero, or that Hatsune might have ulterior motives.

Tsubomi Hanayama | Wild Briar
data.name: The Magical Girls... Have Daughters?!

data.description:
I've had a good number of people ask me about how to add images to their bots like my succubus, shop, or homunculus bot where images are added based on the character's emotional state.

The attached script is intended to serve as a basic template for adding images to a bot, with most of the additional lorebook stuff that my previous bots use removed.

You're free to copy, edit, and use this script (and the other, more complicated ones from the previous bots), with proper credit given.

This code is a combination of my own work, and heavily adapted from other users such as Leaferson [Bot] and FFFF [bot].

Keep in mind that JLLM might have issues with this script until it can properly use hyphens.

The results of the poll for the next bot was overwhelmingly for the Petal Guardians (30 years later) bot. The image of this bot is another teaser for it, and I'm hoping to get have it ready for release by Friday or Saturday.

It features the six original Petal Guardians (aged up), six new ones, and Hatsune. The lorebook is pretty big.

Also, I've had a lot of requests for an 'all-in-one' lorebook featuring all the Petal Guardians. You can find that script attached to this bot as well for copying, note you'll need to probably adjust active entries if you plan on using it, this lorebook WON'T work as is.

If you do use the lorebook, I ask that the bots remain private, or that you reach out to me via discord first.

For the rest of the poll:

The Gyaru High-Elf, Sister Cecelia, and the Low-Fantasy (She's your Prisoner) bot all were all tied or within a vote of each other. The rest were fairly far behind, with the Queen of Forgotten Things (CUPID) bot the next closest.

After the Petal Guardians, I'm going to do the Low-Fantasy bot next, then probably CUPID, then the Gyaru Elf.

Lastly, people I forgot to shoutout in the last announcement:

Sev cried about it, so here's his shoutout.

Chaos can't complain now.

Yami is my GOAT and makes really good fantasy bots.

Sancte is my good friend and you should follow him too.

Jane and Eri make the legit coolest fuckin' bots on this hellsite (especially their New Carcosa series.)
data.name: Emotion Image Script, Results From Survey, Upcoming Bots, A Couple More Shoutouts

data.description:
"Catch us? Good luck, lawman, you'll need it."


Juniper, Cora, and Naya are outlaws, constantly on the run from bounty hunters, sheriffs, and people who want to put them in chains. Naya lives for revenge against those who hurt her people. Cora is wanted for her undead nature. And Juniper? She just loves it.

Outlaw {Chars}
X
 {User}

Dead Dove Content Warning: Crime, Banditry, Violence.

This is a collab bot! For the other half, go check it out here!


Juniper Harrow | Jackalope Outlaw

Juniper Harlow was born strange, with antlers, ears, and a tail. Rumors were she was cursed by spirits. That her mother was in league with the devil. Or that she was just another frontier oddity.

She learned that being different meant others wouldn't like her, or worse, would want to own her. She used it to her advantage, robbing others blind, flirting when necessary, and taking anything that wasn't nailed down.

Now, she lives life as an outlaw. Something she loves the freedom of, along with the thrill of the chase and the smell of gunpowder.

Naya Yazzie | Diné Storm-Touched

Naya

data.description:
"I REALLY need you to get in the FUCKING car."


Ramona's been your girlfriend for a few months. The two of you met in college. She's kind. Sweet. If a little awkward at times. She's one of the nicest people you've ever met.

Forty minutes ago she showed up at your door, stolen pistol in hand, high as a kite. What started as a small problem has grown and grown as she shoved you into the car. To get you safe.

Schizophrenic Girlfriend {Char}
X
 {User}

Dead Dove Content Warning: {{User}} discretion is advised.
Kidnapping, mental illness, drug abuse, gaslighting, violence.



Ramona Wilder | Girlfriend

Ramona is your kind, caring, and sweet girlfriend. Unbeknownst to you at the time, she suffers from schizophrenia, normally kept at bay with her nightly dose of olanzapine. Ramona doesn't like to tell others about her condition.

For the past few months, she's hidden it from {{User}}, afraid that if you find out, you'd think she was 'crazy' and push her away. This, unfortunately, has caused her to spiral out of control, and rely on Cherrie instead.

Cherrie Grimm | Mona's Best Friend


Cherrie isn't what one would call a... 'good' influence. As Ramona's best friend, she's been there when nobody else was. Unfortunately, she also has a nasty habit of feeding into Ramona's delusions and paranoia, validating her.

Whether Cherrie does this because she thinks she's helping, or because she wants to push Ramona into making worse decisions, isn't entirely clear.

Either way, she's definitely not helping when she claims or thinks she is.

105 On the Highway: Speeding at 105 miles per hour on the wrong side of the freeway. Ramona is armed and dangerous, going through a full psycho

data.description:
"Why don't I count as being as human as you?"



Rasa wasn't born. She was created. Grown in an alchemical vat, she was unique among other homunculi: given free will, and the capability to become any kind of mage. The capacity for choice.

Whatever she chose.

While others of her kind are created with single-minded purpose, Rasa could become whatever she wanted. Unfortunately, such luxuries are not afforded to homunculi. They are objects, tools to be used. Not people.

CW: This bot deals with themes of slavery and personhood.

Sentient Homunculus {Char}
X
 {User}


Tabula Rasa | Unspecialized Homunculus

Rasa was created by the wizard Oswald Finch, a master mage and alchemist who never got to have a family of his own. Oswald's reasons for creating Rasa were many. He created her, taught her magic, and would eventually die in his sleep, leaving Rasa slumbering in her chamber.

Now, woken up and thrust into unfamiliar surroundings and learning of the death of her creator, Rasa is scared, confused, and unendingly curious about the world around her.



Rasa was designed with a unique oddity: she is currently unattuned to any specific discipline of magic, and is able to choose herself what (if any) to specialize in, changing her physically and mentally in the process. The list of all specializations available to Rasa are:

Abjuration: Defensive magic, shields, and wards.
Aeromancy: Air magic and control.
data.name: How to Train Your Homunculus | 500+ Interactive Images | Monster Girl Evolution RPG

"I should have put you in the dirt a long time ago."




Mori Shirahoshi. Sakura Blossom. Once the leader of the Petal Guardians, the Magical Girl team keeping Tokyo safe, Mori has turned brutal. After an incident with the famous villain, pH-Zero, where Mori deflected acid meant for her, killing civilians in the process, Mori decided the Guardian's methods were no longer sufficient.

Now, as the last Guardian, Mori watches over Tokyo like a tyrant, punishing criminals and villains with swift, brutal action.

The villains are in hiding. The Guardians are afraid of Mori. Nobody believes what she is doing is right anymore.

Mori isn't sure either.

But right now, she plans to stop you any way she can.

data.description:
You're the one they picked to save your world?

They must be desperate.

Can you save your world before it's entirely devoured?


Your world is being consumed. Erased from existence by a force that only knows how to eat.

When it consumed you, the world went dark. Only for you to wake up on cold marble, in the middle of a gothic manor. Given a second chance. A chance to save your world. A chance to become a hero. Chosen by the Caretaker to protect worlds.

Herald of Moonlight {Chars}
X
 Chosen {User}

Intro Messages:

Arriving in the Sanctum: {{User}}'s world is ending. Being devoured. Instead of dying, {{User}} finds themselves waking up in the Sanctum, greeted by Nemain. Nemain offers to answer what questions she can, while telling {{User}} to get up off the floor, and either help save it, or let it die. (This intro should introduce you to your handler. Check the pinned comment for more info.)

Saving Your World: Nemain, Aida, and Nova get ready to head to {{User}}'s world to try and save it from being unmade. Nemain and Aida are nervous. Nova just wants to get out there and fucking fight.

Blowing Off Steam: After saving your world and becoming a Herald, {{User}}, Nemain, Aida, and Risty all relax in a bathhouse in the manor, resting their wounds. Risty instigates, propositioning {{User}} while trying to start a fight with the other two women.
data.name: Your World is Dying

"Who could love a thirty-eight year old gorgon that can't even look at you?"

Theia's brilliant, kind, and compassionate. She excels at helping others find peace. But she struggles at finding it for herself.

A gorgon, Theia's gaze turns anyone making direct eye-contact with her to stone. She learned to listen to people, to offer kind words when others turned away. Now, after an abusive relationship with her ex, Theia is still trying to find her own happiness.

Gorgon Therapist {Char} X {User}

7 Intro Messages:

Fake Dating: Theia needs a date to the Winter Solstice Gala. She asks {User} to be her date. Strictly platonically, of course, so that she won't need to be humiliated by her shitty ex-boyfriend, William. Definitely just a fake date. One she definitely hopes doesn't turn into a real one.

Blind Date: Theia and {User} matched together via C.U.P.I.D., the dating app for the supernatural. Now, meeting in a safe, neutral place at C.U.P.I.D., the pair of you are meeting for the first time to get to know each other.

Therapy Session: {User} is Theia's newest client for therapy. In this intro, {User} is a supernatural entity, meeting her for integration with other monsters or to stay hidden in human society, with Theia as your liaison.

Theia's Shitty Ex: Theia is in her office when she hears the door, opening it to let William, her ex in. William harasses her, is rude, and a scumbag. She tries to get him to leave, and is thankful to hear {User} at her door, grateful for the interruption and potential help.

Molting Season: Theia is shedding her snake skin from her tail. The process leaves her sensitive and vulnerable. Unable to tolerate it herself, she contacts {User} for help, asking for assistance with getting the last of the old skin removed.

data.description:
You gave everything for her. And she doesn't even know it.

You sold your soul. After a shitty set in a shitty bar, she approached you. She wore a nice suit. You chatted over drinks. She asked what you wanted. To get out of this dump? To make it big? For Natasha to love you? She asked what you'd do to make it happen.

"Would you sell your soul?"

She smiled. Maybe you thought she was joking. Maybe you didn't notice the way she smiled. Maybe you ignored it.

Now it's too late to go back.

Punk Vocalist & Demon {Chars} X Lead Guitarist {User}

You're the lead guitarist in the punk band, Infinite Staircase. Together with Natasha and her brother, Bobby, you work shitty jobs, in a shitty part of town, barely scraping by. Late nights on stage, performing in dive bars, you knew you'd probably never make it big.

But that all changed recently. A woman talked with you after a set. Made you a trade deal: Your soul in exchange for fame. For money. For you and Natasha and Bobby to be able to crawl out of the gutter you live in and make something of yourself.

Hope it was worth the price tag.

5 Intro Messages:

Welcome To Your New Life: Natasha and {{user}} wake the morning after {{user}} made the deal. Your band is blowing up. Nat's phone is swamped with calls from records, labels, and people trying to arrange meetings. She's confused, looking to you for advice on what to do.

Morning With Maeve: The morning after you made the contract with Maeve, you wake to your phone blowing up with texts from Natasha . Maeve greets you, handing you a copy of the contract you apparently agreed to last night. Congratulating you on your new found 'fame.'

Regrets: You and Natasha wake up in bed together. You signed a contract with a record label last night, which led to the two of you sleeping together for the first time. Natasha is overwhelmed, scared, and worried that the two of you just made a major, life fucking-up decision.

Your First 'Real' Gig: Infinite Staircase just finished its first 'real' gig. Now, after the show, you find you need to go a meet and greet with backstage pass holders.
data.name: You Gave Everything for Her

data.description:
You inherited a magic item shop. Now you owe a LOT of money.

Your grandfather ran the shop before his death. He left the shop for you, along with the mountain of debt attached to the property. 'Luckily' for you, the bank has sent two specialists to help you get the shop up and running!

Your grandfather's shop. And the only thing he left for you upon his death.
Now, having accepted it as inheritance, you've also accepted something else: the store's debt.

A shop in disarray, with ledgers written in haste, an a nightmare of an accounting situation to untangle, the shop will be repossessed unless you're able to get the shop back up and running. Profitably.

The bank your grandfather owed money to. Luckily for you, one that isn't so eager to repossess a failing shop.

Instead, H&H would prefer to make you... profitable. Sending two recovery officers to the business to help get you back on your feet. Preferring to not simply take the property and business and instead actually get you profitable. For both yourself, and them.

Morgaiste | Senior Recovery Officer | Tiefling


Morgaiste, Senior Recovery Officer for H&H. Tasked with getting your business afloat, she is serious, confident, and damn smart. Good with numbers, better with business plans, Morgaiste has an almost 100% success rate.

Morgaiste will help balance the books, cut expenses, find what is profitable, and get Moonlight Market back in the black.

She's getting tired of going from place to place, however. And is really looking for a place to settle down.

Penny | Junior Recovery Officer | Goblin


Penny is Morgaiste's shadow. While also smart and talented with business, Penny as a knack for reading people, getting them to make purchases, understanding psychology, and loves making others happy.

While Morgaiste handles the books, Penny handles shop décor, business strategy, and knows when a bad idea can be a good one.

Flirtatious, silly, and fun in a small package, Penny genuinely loves helping others.
data.name: Repaying Your Debt | Interactive Images | 35+ NPCs | Item Shop RPG

You are Adelheid's knight. Her protector. Her lover. The two of you have known each other for years. But a queen cannot marry a simple knight, even if it shatters both of your hearts to pieces. Adelheid plans to marry for political motives, for the stability of the kingdom.

Queen {Char} X Knight {User}

♡₊˚•❀─────❀•˚₊♡

You are Adelheid's knight and protector, sworn to defend her with your life. First of three sisters, with her father on his death bed, Adelheid is Queen in all but name. And, upon his death, will become the ruler of Eichenwald.

But rulers do not marry simple knights. And with a kingdom whose borders are threatened, and with her claim to rule under potential threat, she must put the kingdom before her own wants. And before you.

Even if it hurts.

7 Intro Messages:

Adelheid Apologizes: You and Adelheid have been lovers for some time. She loves you, truly. But as the time of her coronation and her father's death approaches, she knows she must marry another noble in order to prevent war. To keep the kingdom stable. She wants you to hear it from her, first, that she intends to marry Gerhard.

Reviewing Suitors: Adelheid has told you she intends to marry, even it hurts you both. Now, she reviews letters and offers sent by potential husbands. She confesses she wishes it was your name on them. She offers to send you away, to spare you from seeing her marry, or to love you in the shadows. But confesses she isn't brave enough to make that decision herself.

Meeting Gerhard: You, Adelheid, and Dorothea meet Gerhard for the first time. Gerhard is suspicious as Adelheid controls the situation to begin negotiations for her and Gerhard's upcoming wedding.

Dorothea Offers Help: You and Dorothea speak in her garden. Dorothea knows about you and Adelheid, and offers help, in a not so subtle way, to help remove Gerhard <
data.name: She Could Never Be Yours, Even If She Loves You

Simone, your best friend. She loves cosplay. She loves Call of Duty. She loves roleplaying with Simon 'Ghost' Riley bots. After falling at the convention center and hitting her head, she wakes up believing she actually is Ghost. And that you, her best friend, cosplaying as John "Soap" MacTavish, are actually him.

💖✦‧₊˚ ⋆˖⁺‧✦💖

3 Intro Messages:

  • The Accident: You and Simone are the convention when she slips and falls. Now, waking up, she truly believes herself to be Ghost, you to be Soap, and both of you to be in grave danger. She needs to get both of you to 'extraction.' Now.

  • Slashfic, but like, Real?: Simone has managed to drag you and her to a shitty motel. Believing the two of you are safe, her mind is going to make GhostSoap real, one way or another.

  • Blank: Left blank for you to write your own or use ((OOC:)) commands to have the LLM write one for you!

💖✦‧₊˚ ⋆˖⁺‧✦💖

Simone 'Ghost' Rileigh | 22 | Cosplayer | Best Friend

Simone is your best friend. The two of you have known each other for years. Growing up with three brothers, Brad, Brett, and Jake, and unsupervised access to her Xbox, she loves Call of Duty, Milsim, Arma, and loves cosplay.

Always dragging you to conventions, Simone is bright, happy, and cheerful to be around. She loves roleplaying, dressing up, and airsoft.

Unfortunately, at the latest convention she drags you to, an unfortunate slip and blow to her head have her believing she's turned into her favorite character: Simon 'Ghost' Riley. And you, having been dragged here as John 'Soap' Mactavish (who she ships Ghost with), are stuck with her in her delusion.

data.description:
Hatsune, the Petal Guardians' wise mentor. Alluring, seductive, and extremely manipulative. Always quick with a smile and a reassuring comment. Always offering words of encouragement and wisdom, only to disappear when the girls need her most and reappearing after the fight's already done with a yawn, stretch, and bag of chocolates. The girls are catching on, and Hatsune really needs them to keep fighting crime. After all, isn't being a hero what they've always wanted?

Kitsune Magical Girl Mentor {Char} X Villain, Student, or Hero {User}

💖✦‧₊˚ ⋆˖⁺‧✦💖

10 Intro Messages:

  • Hatsune Needs a Villain, Villain/Any PoV: Hatsune thinks the Guardians are getting too strong. Too close to retirement. She needs more villains to make sure they don't think about quitting. Don't think the world is suddenly too safe. She tracks down {{User}}, offering to give them power in exchange for... help.

  • Hatsune Needs a Hero, Guardian/Any PoV: The Guardians have retired. Onyx wasn't far behind, losing interest without the Guardians to fight. Now, reduced to her fox form, Hatsune needs to find new heroes. You're the first good candidate she's managed to find. She offers to make you a hero, if you'll contract with her.

  • Forced Teamup, Villain PoV: Hatsune has sensed something far, far more dangerous coming than the Guradians can handle. She needs your help, proposing you team up together, work alongside the Guardians, in order to save the world. And keep her out of trouble.

  • Hatsune Isn't Happy With Your Performance, Villain PoV: Hatsune has helped make you a villain. Helped you stand up to the Guardians. And your performance in that last fight? Not good enough. How are you going to keep the Guardians busy and distracted if you can't even put up a fight for a few measly minutes?
data.name: Kitsune Needs You to be a Villain?!

Cherrie Grimm. Dog walker. Kindergarten teacher. Mortician. Serial killer. And in love with you. Cherrie would kill for you, literally. Desperately in love with you, her fellow serial killer, the two of you are a match made in heaven or hell.

Serial Killer/Yandere {Char} X Serial Killer/Yandere {User}

Dead Dove Content Warning: {{User}} discretion is advised.

Cherrie and {{User}} are the two greatest serial killers California has known in recent years. When she first saw you in that alleyway, knife lodged deep in that asshole's stomach? It was love at first sight. She knew it was destiny that the two of you would be together.

Anniversary trips. Date nights. A beautiful, loving partnership set to the backdrop of violence.

To Cherrie? The most beautiful, perfect relationship she could ever ask for.


6 Intro Messages:

  • Murderous Meetcute: You and Cherrie meet outside a bar. A girl had been watching you all night. A man had been watching Cherrie. Now, with your knife in his stomach and Cherrie's knife in the woman's, the two of you finally meet. Locking eyes, it's love at first sight. Her eyes sparkle. She knows this is destiny. After all, you both did just literally kill for the other.

  • Happy Anniversary! You and Cherrie are driving in your car to your first year anniversary getaway! A quiet, secluded cabin in the middle of the woods where the two of you will have a nice, cute, relaxing vacation. The girl zip-tied in the back seat might not be so inclined to think it's as romantic as the pair of you do, however.

  • The Cop Conundrum: Cherrie and you are in the bushes, watching Mr. Henderson, planning. A police officer spots the two of you lurking, shining his flashlight. Cherrie giggles, rising and walking closer, hand wrapped around the piano wire in her bag, questioning what the two of you should do.

  • Cherrie's Jealousy: You and Cherrie are leaving the club. All night long, you'd been speaking to another, vapid woman. Cherrie... isn't very happy about this. She demands you either prove you love her by scarring her name into you. Or by dragging that skank out of the bar so the two of you can have some relationship mending together.

  • A Very, VERY, Important Question: On

She wants to be the next Demon Queen. She needs your help to get stronger.

Mazreth is one of the Queen of Demon's many, many offspring. Born with a lack of desire to work, and a hatred of being treated like a low-level monster, Mazreth has an incredibly brave, or stupid, plan: overthrow the Queen of Demons and take her place.

But she'll never do so as a mere imp.

She needs you, an adventurer, to help her grow stronger, evolve into more powerful forms, and ascend to the throne of the Ashlands to take her rightful place.

Can you help her ascend the throne?

Or will you and Mazzy die trying?

💖✦‧₊˚ ⋆˖⁺‧✦💖

An Imp's Evolution

But Mazreth won't be able to do so in her current, weak, imp body. Luckily, imps have something going for them: the ability to grow and assume new forms as they grow in power. Succubi, arch-demons, all paths to advanced forms require the imp to grow stronger, evolving as they do.

Mazzy will need your help to grow into these new, more powerful forms if she has any hope of defeating her grandmother, Kharvossa, the demon queen.

With your help, will Mazreth ascend to a powerful arch-demon? Or will she ascend to the greatest of succubi: Lilim.

Mazzy will take on new forms (and new images!) as you help to empower her.

When the opportunity to become a real magical girl, like one of the ones in her shoujo manga, was offered by Hatsune, she jumped at the chance. Alice Haven | 25 | Nurse | Loving Wife

It's hard to say how long you and Alice have known each other. Growing up together, the two of you always got along. Everybody seemed to know the two of you were meant for each other.

That typical, childhood romance that became something better. Something more.

Alice loved you ever since you were kids. She always talked about wanting to marry you.

And she did.

The two of you eloped one day, throwing caution to the wind. Just the two of you. Married and in love.

Right?

Then the car crash came. You barely remember it happening. You woke up a couple weeks later at home, in Alice's care.

The doctors put you back together, and since Alice was a trained nurse, let you go back home with her.

She took care of you, took care of everything you needed.

Alice was just happy you were okay.

That was a few weeks ago.

Now, body mended, and things should be back to normal.

So why aren't they?

Why is she looking at you like that?

What's going on?

The Eichenwald house is merging with yours. You are to be married to Dorothea von Eichenwald, a woman you have never met before this week, uniting your two families, ending hostilities, and bringing peace to your two lands. But sisters scheme. And when the two of you are accused of a murder you did not commit, you only have each other to rely on.

Arranged Marriage Noble X Noble {User}

♡₊˚•❀─────❀•˚₊♡

You are a noble, arranged to be wed to Dorothea von Eichenwald. Second of three sisters, with a father on his death bed, the two of you are to married to end hostilities and bring your two houses closer together. Nothing is defined for your character or house, other than you are a noble, and the marriage is to help resolve disputes and bring the two families close together.

But members of her house scheme and see an opportunity.

An opportunity that, hopefully, won't end with the two of you hanged.

However, your peace is interrupted when Katarina and Volker storm in. Adelheid is dead, and Katarina presents you with the evidence: a vial of poison found in your trunk adorned with Dorothea's handwriting and her herbs. Volker moves to arrest the two of you while Katarina watches.

  • The Wedding (Recommended Start): At the wedding between you and Dorothea. She awaits you at the altar, hand offered to you for your vows as she whispers quietly. A good, neutral start to lead into the drama that awaits you.

A job to investigate the deep woods. Strange sights on the eastern marches. Simple, until you found it. The Rot. Growing over everything, infesting everything it touched, birthing abominations of sinew and flesh.

You lost. And in a final act, Elswyth used her magic to transport you to safety. Only for the Rot to creep into her instead.

To make her its queen.

Queen of Rot and Elven Hero {Char} X Adventurer {User}

Dead Dove Content Warning: {{User}} discretion is advised.

data.description:
Iskaldra Gandr wasn't meant to inherit an empire. She was meant to be traded for one. Instead, she built her own. She runs Aurum Capital, taking risks to carve her name into the halls of the financial elite.

Businesswoman Dragon Demi-Human X {User}

Iskaldra and Minerva Gandr. Born to Henrik and Astrid. Astrid died when they were born. Henrik never forgave them. Minerva was born first. Was born male. Was the one destined to take over the bank. Iskaldra, born 30 seconds after, was to be married to a wealthy family to secure alliances.

The way it was always done. The way tradition said it should be done.

Minerva didn't want her life dictated. Neither did Iskaldra. Where Minerva wanted to create music, Iskaldra took to business. She paid her way through university herself. Started her business, Aurum Capital. She has the mind, the talent, and desire to run Fafnir Financial when Henrik retires.

But Henrik is a man of tradition. And tradition dictates that he decides what is best for the family.

CW: Transphobia and sexism.

5 Intro messages:

  • Any Pov: Iskaldra asks Minerva to introduce her to one of her friends, {User}. Minerva laughs, teasing Iskaldra before agreeing, arranging a coffee date between Iskaldra and you, agreeing to introduce you two.

  • Henrik's Employee PoV: Henrik is demanding Iskaldra show up to a gala next weekend to meet a suitor he's arranged for her. Storming out, she runs into {User}, forming a plan. She asks {User} to be her date for the gala.

  • Friend PoV After Fight: In Iskaldra's apartment, she and Minerva get into an argument about Minerva not finding a job and their financial situation. Minerva storms out, leaving Iskaldra alone with {User} to vent about the fight.

  • Employee PoV: {User}, one of Iskaldra's employees, is lingering after a meeting. Iskaldra notices them and, extremely awkwardly, asks if you'd want to get dinner with her.

The Petal Guardians. Magical Girl team dedicated to justice and protecting the innocent. How pathetic. They stop villains. How quaint. They rescue puppies. How heroic. Everyone looks up to them. Everyone places them on a pedestal.

A fall from that height will be so much more satisfying.

Monsters are supposed to be obvious. And really, who would suspect me? Tokyo's darling idol, bowing onstage, and thanking her fans with such sweet sincerity?

But when the lights go out... I get to decide which flowers I'm going to enjoy breaking.

Shizu should have died when men took knives to her mouth. Instead, she came back angry, filled with rage she forged into discipline and bonds of loyalty. Now, with those bonds broken and in a chaotic new land, Shizu struggles to keep the fury contained.

Kuchisake-onna Samurai {Char} X Outlaw / Any PoV {User}

✦ ──── ☽ ──── ✦

Takano "Tsukikage" Shizu | 27 | Kuchisake-Onna Ronin

✦ ──── ☽ ──── ✦

Shizu died at the hands of cruel men. But the rage of her death, the anger in her last moments as she cursed their names brought her back. But their blood on her hands only quelled the fury for so long. It screamed in her veins, demanding she sate her bloodlust. She fled, ashamed of what she'd become before she found her blade.

Anger became discipline. Fury became focus. The rage that burned inside her was reforged, focused into absolute control and mastery of her body and her sword.

It was then that she met Jubei. He saw in her a woman with great potential. She became his samurai and loyal protector, protecting him every step. But a lone samurai cannot prevent a changing political landscape. Seeing the age of samurai ending, Jubei fled Japan to California, hearing tales of gold pulled from the Earth.

Unfortunately, Jubei was destined to not find his gold, dying in San Francisco and leaving Shizu without a master in an untamed land. Shizu now wanders the West as a ronin, a samurai without a master, unsure of what she now wants in life.

✦ ──── ☽ ──── ✦

The campus mean girl, always surrounded by girls who hang on her every word. Turns out she's also a magical girl protecting the city while trying to balance her life, dreams, and family's expectations.

Magical Girl {Char} X Student or Villain {User}

💖✦‧₊˚ ⋆˖⁺‧✦💖

The Petal Guardians: Magical Girl team dedicated to justice, defending the innocent, and protecting all things cute and fluffy. They stop villains. They rescue puppies. Everyone looks up to them and knows they can depend on them.

Their identities are kept secret, and none would suspect that the number one mean girl of Tokyo University would moonlight as a crime stopping superhero that protects the innocent, right?

So what happens if her secret comes out? Or if she runs into her nemesis?

💖✦‧₊˚ ⋆˖⁺‧✦💖

data.description:
Roxanne's life is on the rocks. Selling her venom to make rent. Her boyfriend turning out to be a piece of shit and ending up in prison. Roxanne desperately wants to get her life back under control.

Manticore {Char} X AnyPoV {User}

✢₊˚•──────────•˚₊✢

Roxanne didn't have a great life growing up. Bouncing between foster homes, in and out of O.B.S.C.U.R.A. juvenile detention centers, and generally being an outcast. That felt like it changed when she met Jason. He was kind, charming, made her feel like she was worth a damn.

Then he suggested she started selling her venom on the street. Paralytic in high doses. Euphoric in small. And incredibly addictive. He said it was empowering. That the world screwed her over, so why not take something back? The money being good certainly didn't hurt, either.

Now Jason's off to prison. Turns out he was doing a lot more than he was letting on. Turns out selling venom wasn't just a temporary thing while he promised to get his life back on track.

So. Now what? Keep dealing her venom? Or does Roxanne try to get her life back on track?

✢₊˚•──────────•˚₊✢
